Metadata.title: Samuel Pokam | Full-Stack Developer
Metadata.description: Portfolio of Samuel Pokam — Full-Stack Developer crafting modern digital experiences.

Hero.name: Samuel Pokam
Hero.tagline: I build modern web experiences with clean code and thoughtful design.

About.title: About Me
About.p1: 7 years writing code. Not to check boxes, but because architecting a product well remains one of the most satisfying intellectual exercises there is.
About.p2: Based in Quebec, I help companies ship digital products by day, and build my own platforms by night — nomaqbanq for medical exam preparation, and FanTribe for creator monetization. Two different markets, same obsession for details.
About.p3: Stack: Next.js · React · TypeScript · Tailwind · Convex · Supabase · Stripe · Vercel.
About.p4: If you're looking for someone who understands product stakes as much as technical constraints — we're probably on the same wavelength.

nomaqbanq.title: NOMAQbanq
nomaqbanq.description: A medical exam preparation platform for the EACMC Part I, featuring a 5000+ question bank, timed mock exams, progress tracking, and an admin dashboard with Stripe payments.
nomaqbanq.longDescription: NOMAQbanq is a comprehensive medical exam preparation platform designed for candidates preparing for the EACMC Part I examination. The platform provides an extensive question bank of over 5,000 practice questions organized by medical discipline, along with timed mock exams that simulate real test conditions. Students can track their progress through detailed analytics dashboards, identify weak areas, and focus their study efforts accordingly. The platform includes a full admin interface for content management and integrates Stripe for subscription-based access.
features: 5,000+ practice questions organized by medical discipline with detailed explanations
Timed mock exams simulating real EACMC Part I test conditions
Progress tracking with analytics dashboard and performance insights
Admin dashboard for question management and user administration
Stripe-powered subscription system with multiple plan tiers
challenges: Implemented real-time data sync with Convex for instant progress updates across devices
Built a performant question rendering engine handling rich medical content with images and formatting
Designed a scalable exam timer system that persists state across browser refreshes

fantribe.title: FanTribe
fantribe.description: A social platform for content creators to monetize through subscriptions, with real-time messaging, video streaming via Bunny CDN, and mobile money payment support for Africa.
fantribe.longDescription: FanTribe is a social platform that empowers content creators to build communities and monetize their work through subscription-based access. The platform features real-time messaging between creators and subscribers, video content delivery via Bunny CDN for optimal streaming performance, and supports mobile money payment methods tailored for the African market alongside traditional payment options through Stripe.
features: Subscription-based monetization system for content creators
Real-time messaging and community features powered by Convex
Video streaming and content delivery via Bunny CDN
Mobile money payment integration for African markets
Creator dashboard with analytics, subscriber management, and content scheduling
challenges: Integrated multiple payment providers (Stripe + mobile money) with unified subscription management
Optimized video delivery pipeline with Bunny CDN for low-latency streaming across regions
Built real-time notification system handling high concurrency with Convex subscriptions

mescontacts.title: Mescontacts.ca
mescontacts.description: A Quebec-based business directory with category and location search, interactive Mapbox maps, and a full admin dashboard for managing verified listings.
mescontacts.longDescription: Mescontacts.ca is a Quebec-focused business directory that helps users discover local businesses through powerful search and interactive maps. The platform features category and location-based filtering, interactive Mapbox maps for visual exploration, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for managing and verifying business listings. Built to serve the Quebec community with a focus on discoverability and trust.
features: Advanced search with category and location-based filtering
Interactive Mapbox maps for visual business discovery
Full admin dashboard for listing management and verification
Business profiles with contact details, hours, and reviews
challenges: Integrated Mapbox GL with dynamic clustering for thousands of business markers
Built a verification workflow ensuring listing quality and accuracy
Optimized search with geospatial queries for fast location-based results

delta.title: Project Delta
delta.description: A cross-platform mobile app for personal finance tracking with offline support and cloud sync via Firebase.
delta.longDescription: Project Delta is a cross-platform mobile application for personal finance management, built with React Native and Expo. The app enables users to track expenses, set budgets, and visualize spending patterns through intuitive charts. It features full offline support with local data persistence and seamless cloud synchronization via Firebase, ensuring users always have access to their financial data.
features: Expense tracking with categorization and budget management
Visual spending analytics with interactive charts
Full offline support with local persistence
Cloud sync via Firebase for cross-device access
challenges: Implemented offline-first architecture with conflict resolution for cloud sync
Built performant chart rendering for large datasets on mobile devices
